message:
Command `
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Timing from Step 68 (last completed STA) ==="
echo "--- WNS max ---"
cat "$RUN_DIR/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/wns.max.rpt"
echo "--- WNS min ---"
cat "$RUN_DIR/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/wns.min.rpt"
echo "--- TNS max ---"
cat "$RUN_DIR/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/tns.max.rpt"
echo "--- TNS min ---"
cat "$RUN_DIR/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/tns.min.rpt"
echo "--- or_metrics_out ---"
cat "$RUN_DIR/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/or_metrics_out.json"

echo ""
echo "=== Step 68 state_out.json (key fields) ==="
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$RUN_DIR/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/state_out.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
# Print keys
for k,v in d.items():
    if isinstance(v, str) and len(v) < 200:
        print(f'  {k}: {v}')
    elif isinstance(v, dict):
        print(f'  {k}: (dict with {len(v)} keys)')
    elif isinstance(v, list):
        print(f'  {k}: (list with {len(v)} elements)')
    else:
        print(f'  {k}: {v}')
"
` executed with exit code 0.
